{{Infobox concept
| name = Iterations
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Iterations]] are represented as white spots on the map of the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Executors]] are sent into [[Iterations]] on the verge of destruction.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Foxes]] allow travel between and within [[Iterations]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
